SEARCH
Package it.unipi.tonightscall.service

Class AuthService

java.lang.Object
it.unipi.tonightscall.service.AuthService
@Service public class AuthService extends Object
Service class handling authentication logic.

This service manages the core business logic for user registration and login, interacting with the repository for data persistence, the password encoder for security, and the JWT service for token generation.

  • Constructor Details

    • AuthService

      public AuthService(UserRepository userRepository, OrganizerRepository organizerRepository, OrganizationRepository organizationRepository, UserGraphRepository userGraphRepository, OrganizerGraphRepository organizerGraphRepository, TopicGraphRepository topicGraphRepository, org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder, JWTService jwtService)

  • Method Details

    • registerUser

      @Transactional public UserDTO registerUser(UserDTO userDto)
      Registers a new user in the system.

      Checks if the username is already taken. If not, encodes the password, maps the DTO to an entity, and saves it to the database.

      Parameters:
      userDto - The data transfer object containing user details.
      Returns:
      The DTO of the newly created user (without the password).
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the username already exists or the data are not consistent.

    • loginUser

      public String loginUser(String username, String rawPassword)
      Authenticates a user and generates a JWT token.
      Parameters:
      username - The username provided by the client.
      rawPassword - The plain text password provided by the client.
      Returns:
      A valid JWT token string.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the user is not found or the password does not match.

    • registerOrganizer

      @Transactional public OrganizerDTO registerOrganizer(OrganizerDTO organizerDto)
      Registers a new Organizer (Individual).

      Saves the entity in MongoDB and creates a corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      organizerDto - The details of the organizer to register.
      Returns:
      The registered OrganizerDTO.

    • loginOrganizer

      public String loginOrganizer(String username, String rawPassword)
      Authenticates an Organizer.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the organizer.
      rawPassword - The password.
      Returns:
      JWT Token with ORGANIZER_ROLE.

    • loginOrganization

      public String loginOrganization(String username, String password)
      Authenticates an Organization via one of its members.

      Since Organizations don't have a single password, this method checks if the provided password matches ANY of the members' passwords within that organization.

      Parameters:
      username - The name of the Organization.
      password - The password of a member attempting to login on behalf of the org.
      Returns:
      JWT Token with ORGANIZATION_ROLE.
